---
title: atmos terraform cache delete
sidebar_label: cache delete
sidebar_class_name: command
id: delete
description: Delete a specific cached object by its cache key.
---
import Intro from '@site/src/components/Intro'
import Screengrab from '@site/src/components/Screengrab'

<Intro>
Delete a single cached object (and its metadata sidecar) by its cache key, as shown by `atmos terraform cache list`.
</Intro>

<Screengrab title="atmos terraform cache delete --help" slug="atmos-terraform-cache-delete--help" />

## Usage

```shell
atmos terraform cache delete <key>
```

## Arguments

<dl>
  <dt>`key`</dt>
  <dd>The cache key to delete, e.g. `providers/registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/aws/index.json`. Use [`atmos terraform cache list`](/cli/commands/terraform/cache/list) to find keys.</dd>
</dl>

## Examples

```shell
atmos terraform cache delete providers/registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/aws/index.json
```

## Related Commands

- [`atmos terraform cache list`](/cli/commands/terraform/cache/list)
- [`atmos terraform cache prune`](/cli/commands/terraform/cache/prune)
